title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 300.400 - Obedience of pedestrians to bridge and railroad signals
text:
300.400.  Obedience of pedestrians to bridge and railroad signals. — 1.  No pedestrian shall enter or remain upon any bridge or approach thereto beyond the bridge signal, gate, or barrier after a bridge operation signal indication has been given.
  2.  No pedestrian shall pass through, around, over, or under any crossing gate or barrier at a railroad grade crossing or bridge while such gate or barrier is closed or is being opened or closed.
(L. 1965 p. 445 § 87)
